task_completion.description: The agent opens the target document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for LibreOffice Writer (or a similar word processor) open with the file 'project_chariot_investigation.odt' visible in the title bar or editing area.

task_completion.description: The title, H1, and H2 headings are formatted appropriately.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the title and expected headings (e.g., 'Executive Summary', 'Findings', 'Finding 1: Fictitious Vendor Creation') to be styled distinctly from normal text, such as having a larger font size, bold weight, or showing 'Heading 1' / 'Heading 2' in the styles dropdown when selected.

task_completion.description: The specified entities are emphasized with bold text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the specific phrases 'Apex Consulting LLC' and 'Meridian Solutions' to be formatted in bold text within the document body.

task_completion.description: The transaction data is formatted as a table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the data under the 'Transaction Analysis' section to be organized into a visible table structure with rows and columns.

task_completion.description: The recommendations are formatted as a list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the items under the 'Internal Control Recommendations' section to be formatted using bullet points or a numbered list.

task_completion.description: The formatted document is saved to its original path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the agent clicking the 'Save' button (floppy disk icon), using the File > Save menu, or the absence of an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk) in the title bar at the end of the task.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent interacted with LibreOffice Writer's graphical interface rather than trying to edit the .odt file directly using a terminal text editor or python script.

integrity.description: The agent used actual formatting tools rather than plain text workarounds.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent used the word processor's built-in tools (e.g., Table insertion, List buttons, Bold button, Styles dropdown) instead of just typing markdown symbols like asterisks or dashes.

integrity.description: The agent preserved the original content of the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent did not delete the main body text of the report or replace it with a generic template while applying the formatting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document path is /home/ga/Documents/project_chariot_investigation.odt. The title is 'Project Chariot: Forensic Audit Report'.
